## Checklist

- [ ] The affected package builds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Relevant test/verify script passes (e.g. `node scripts/e2e.mjs`)
- [ ] No secrets committed; `.env` files untouched
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or config changed
- [ ] Follows the existing code style (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
